title: euphrasia collina subsp. speciosa
intro: Euphrasia collina subsp. speciosa, also known as the alpine eye-bright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia collina subsp. speciosa include its ability to reduce eye strain and inflammation, alleviate symptoms of hay fever, and support overall eye health. Euphrasia collina subsp. speciosa can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tinctures, infusions, and eye drops, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
